evals.prompt: 分析SK海力士当前的盈利预测，重点关注其HBM产能扩张周期和毛利率变化趋势
evals.expected_output: Four-dimension C-B analysis covering leading indicators (HBM orders, pre-pay status), moat quality (premium vs cost-driven margins), capacity-profit lag (M16 factory yield ramp, depreciation phase), and valuation (PE vs cycle position)

evals.prompt: 帮我评估一下台积电的CapEx周期和它对未来18个月盈利的影响
evals.expected_output: Analysis of TSMC's CapEx transmission to revenue, CoWoS bottleneck positioning, yield threshold status, and PE valuation timing — synthesized into the standard forecast format

evals.prompt: 英伟达现在的估值有没有透支未来的增长？
evals.expected_output: Valuation discounting analysis: current PE calibration, bull thesis exhaustion indicators, whether stock price reflects 2026 or 2027 earnings potential
